nasb.text: For her profit is better than the profit of silver And her gain better than fine gold.

esv.text: for the gain from her is better than gain from silver and her profit better than gold.

cnv.text: 因為智慧的利潤勝過銀子的利潤， 智慧的收益勝過黃金的收益。

ccb.text: 因为智慧比银子更有价值， 比金子更有益处，

csbs.text: 因为智慧的盈利好过银子， 她的收成胜过金子；
